alt: Seafood spaghetti with mussels and clams
description: Close-up of steaming seafood spaghetti with open mussels and clams, cherry tomatoes and parsley, served on a white plate on a wooden table

alt: Golden mixed fried seafood served with lemon
description: Golden crispy mixed fried fish on a white ceramic plate with lemon wedges and salad leaves

alt: Grilled tuna with Tropea red onion
description: Grilled red tuna steak, pink in the centre, with caramelised onion and balsamic reduction, elegant plating
Classic tiramisù portion in a clear glass with cocoa powder dusting and a silver spoon beside it
Elegant restaurant interior with natural stone arches, tables set with white tablecloths, warm lighting, wood and nautical rope details

alt: Terrace with sea view at sunset
description: Restaurant terrace overlooking the sea with set tables, wrought iron railing, view of crystal clear water and Tropea cliff at sunset
Close-up of a set table with white tablecloth, silver cutlery, crystal glasses, small vase with wildflowers
Artisan wrought iron sign reading Taverna del Porto, mounted on light stone wall with pink bougainvillea

alt: Chef at work in the restaurant kitchen
description: Italian chef in white jacket working in the professional kitchen, flames on the stove, pan in hand, dynamic environment
View of Tropea's tourist harbour with colourful fishing boats in the foreground, blue sea, hilltop village in the background

alt: Sunset over the sea from the restaurant
description: Spectacular sunset over the Tyrrhenian Sea with orange and purple sky, silhouette of the Calabrian coast, seen from the restaurant terrace
Wooden crate with freshly caught fish: sea bream, amberjack, red prawns, ice, fishing port setting
